description:
Verbsy is a simple word-of-the-day and vocabulary app for iPhone.

Learn one new word each day. Add word widgets to your Home Screen and Lock Screen. Get daily word reminders. Choose the topics, difficulty, and reminder frequency that fit how you want to learn. Scroll a clean word feed, practice with quick quizzes, save favorite words, and track your streak.

HOME SCREEN & LOCK SCREEN WIDGETS
Add a daily word to your iPhone Home Screen or Lock Screen. Widgets show the word and a short definition so you can learn without opening the app. Verbsy Pro unlocks premium widget styles and faster word rotation, so your widgets can change words more often.

DAILY WORD REMINDERS
Get word-of-the-day notifications with short definitions. Choose how often you want reminders and when they should start. Pick the topics you prefer so your daily words match what you want to learn.

WORD FEED
Scroll through words one at a time. Each word includes:
- Clear definition
- Pronunciation
- Example sentences
- Word origin
- Usage context

TOPICS & DIFFICULTY
Personalize Verbsy around how you want to learn. Choose topics like communication, psychology, writing, philosophy, productivity, emotion, self-improvement, everyday life, and more. Set your word difficulty from everyday to advanced.

QUICK QUIZZES
Practice words with short quiz questions. Review definitions, check your accuracy, and keep learning in small sessions.

FAVORITES, STATS & STREAKS
Save words you want to remember. See words learned, saved words, quiz accuracy, and your daily streak.

FREE FEATURES
- Word feed
- Quick quizzes
- Favorites
- Basic stats
- Daily streak
- Topic and difficulty preferences
- No account required

VERBSY PRO
Verbsy Pro unlocks word-of-the-day notifications, notification frequency controls, premium Home Screen and Lock Screen widget styles, and faster widget word rotation.

Verbsy Pro includes a 3-day free trial, then $9.99/month or $29.99/year. Cancel anytime in Settings at least 24 hours before renewal. Apple's standard EULA applies: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: Learn one new word every day with widgets, daily reminders, topic and difficulty preferences, quick quizzes, favorites, and streaks.
